title: Orchis peramoena
taxonomy: Orchis peramoena belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is native to China. It is a species of orchid in the genus Orchis, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. This genus is part of the subtribe Orchidinae, a group of orchids that are commonly known as "naked orchids." The Orchis peramoena is further classified as a member of the subgenus Orchis, which includes several species of terrestrial orchids. Within the Orchis genus, Orchis peramoena is classified as a distinct species.
